LanguageData.ElectricPump.description: A compact 250 W electric pump that supplies up to 1,200 L/h before long-network flow losses.
LanguageData.PumpingStation.description: A 10 kW industrial pumping station that supplies up to 50,000 L/h before long-network flow losses.
LanguageData.WindPump.description: A wind-driven pump supplying up to 1,500 L/h in unobstructed wind. Trees, buildings and roofs in its wind path reduce or stop its output.
